title: Print Board blank columns?
excerpt:
When we try to Print Board using the board menu (three dots at top right), now some columns are blank. Anyone has have this problem pop up lately? It’s sporatic. Some fields/columns have text, some don’t. Just blank. 
 
…

posts.author: DallasBentley (Dallas Bentley)
posts.cookedHtml:
When we try to Print Board using the board menu (three dots at top right), now some columns are blank. Anyone has have this problem pop up lately? It’s sporatic. Some fields/columns have text, some don’t. Just blank.

Thanks,
Dallas
